rawMetadata.set: LearnMore ('สื่อการสอน LearnMore') numbered teaching set
rawMetadata.filename: 5.ตำราเพชรัตน์มหายันต์.pdf
rawMetadata.internal_title: อธิบายวิธีของเลขยันต์
rawMetadata.content_summary: Yantra manual. Covers: ritual respect/offering prerequisites before learning; meaning of yantra shapes (circles=Buddha's face/placenta, squares=four elements/continents, triangles=Triple Gem); uṇāloma symbolism; many katha/sutra formulas; metta/mahaniyom/kongkraphan-chatri magic; instructions for making takrut, pha-yant (ผ้าประเจียด), amulets (ลูกประคำ), and ผง; hundreds of named 'นะ' (na) formulas.
rawMetadata.note: Only member of the LearnMore numbered set that survived — the others (4, 7.1, 7.2, 8, 9...) expired as chat file-transfers. Binary not yet stored locally; held in Drive. Naming discrepancy to reconcile: the chat listing showed #5 as 'กระแสจิต เคล็ดลับไสยศาสตร์.pdf'.
